mapper.sql: id, category_name, parent_id, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM category WHERE status = 1 AND status <> -1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time ASC
SELECT FROM category WHERE status <> -1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time ASC
SELECT FROM category WHERE status <> -1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM category WHERE status <> -1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM category WHERE category_name = #{categoryName} AND status <> -1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM category WHERE category_name = #{categoryName} AND id <> #{id} AND status <> -1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (category_name, parent_id, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{categoryName}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE category SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE category SET status = -1 WHERE id = #{id}
